ogTitle: Christies Beach vs Clapham: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Christies Beach and Clapham.
heading: Christies Beach vs Clapham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Christies Beach, South Australia and Clapham, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Christies Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Clapham (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Christies Beach or Clapham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Christies Beach has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Clapham scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Christies Beach scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Clapham scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Christies Beach or Clapham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Christies Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
